name: Zach Galifianakis
bio: Zach Galifianakis is an American comedian and actor known for an absurdist stand-up act that often features him at a piano, plus deadpan non sequiturs. He grew the alt-comedy circuit before breaking out as Alan in The Hangover trilogy. He created and hosted the deadpan celebrity-interview web series Between Two Ferns.

timeline.ev: Appears in his own Comedy Central Presents stand-up special
Launches Between Two Ferns on Funny or Die
Breaks out as Alan in The Hangover
Interviews President Obama on Between Two Ferns
FX series Baskets, which he co-created and stars in, premieres

accolades: Primetime Emmy Award for Between Two Ferns
Critics Choice Television Award nomination for Baskets
Star of the record-grossing R-rated comedy The Hangover
